name: Primesource
description_short: PrimeSource Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering auto loans, credit cards, and digital banking services with competitive rates and shared branching access.
description_long:
PrimeSource Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative serving consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banks. Based on their website presence and routing number (325182726), they function as a federally insured credit union under NCUA oversight. The institution positions itself as a community-focused financial partner emphasizing member education and financial wellness, particularly through youth savings programs launched in April.

PrimeSource offers a comprehensive suite of lending and deposit products centered on auto financing, VISA credit cards, and powersports loans. Their advertised rates include new/used auto loans as low as 4.24% APR, VISA cards at 8.90% APR, and powersports financing at 5.49% APR. Members can access traditional services including ATMs and shared branching networks, online banking through their "It's Me 247" platform, and a mobile app available on Apple, Amazon, and Android devices. The institution emphasizes free digital tools and savings automation features.

PrimeSource distinguishes itself through member-centric digital innovation and savings automation. Their "Round Up To Save" feature automatically rounds debit card purchases to the nearest dollar and transfers the difference to savings accounts—at no cost. This behavioral finance approach appeals to members seeking passive wealth-building tools. The mobile app provides comprehensive account management including mobile deposits, fund transfers, loan applications, and bill payment. Text banking and youth account programs further demonstrate their focus on accessibility and financial literacy across demographics.

PrimeSource serves consumers who value credit union principles (member ownership, community focus) and competitive lending rates over large bank convenience. The institution's rate offerings on auto loans are competitive but not exceptionally distinctive. Their digital services and savings automation features address modern consumer expectations. However, the website content is limited regarding deposit products, lending limits, membership eligibility, fee structures, or geographic service areas, making comprehensive evaluation difficult. Members should contact branches directly for complete product details and eligibility requirements.
services: New and used auto loans (4.24% APR advertised)
Mobile app with mobile deposit capabilities
Round Up To Save automated savings transfers
ATM access and shared branching network
Loan application and rate viewing through mobile app
Account balance checks and transaction history review
pros: Competitive auto loan rates as low as 4.24% APR for new and used vehicles
Free mobile app with mobile deposit, fund transfers, and real-time account management across Apple, Amazon, and Android
Round Up To Save feature automatically builds savings from debit card purchases at no cost
Free online banking (It's Me 247) and free mobile banking with no monthly fees advertised
Shared branching and ATM network access through credit union cooperative system
Free text banking service for account access and transactions
Youth savings accounts and financial literacy programs for members starting in childhood
cons: Website provides no information on membership eligibility requirements or geographic service area limitations
No disclosure of deposit account fees, minimum balances, or overdraft policies on public website
Limited product information—no details on savings account rates, CD terms, or lending limits and approval requirements
No mention of insurance products, retirement accounts, or investment services that larger credit unions typically offer
Website does not display business hours, complete branch locations, or full service menu for member reference
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto and powersports financing with rates below traditional bank averages
Digitally-native consumers who want mobile deposit, bill pay, and account management without branch visits
Savers interested in passive savings automation through Round Up features and behavioral finance tools
Parents and families looking to build children's financial literacy through youth savings accounts
diagnosis: PrimeSource Credit Union is best for members prioritizing competitive auto loan rates, digital banking convenience, and passive savings automation over branch-heavy banking. The primary caveat is that the website omits critical details on membership requirements, fee structures, and geographic eligibility—requiring direct contact with branches for complete product and policy information before joining.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Primesource — Credit Union in Spokane, WA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Primesource — NCUA-insured credit union in Spokane, WA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
